test_cases.title: Verify that the user can successfully log time with valid inputs.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
expected_result: The entry should be created successfully.
The entry should be displayed in the Timesheet Management module.

test_cases.title: Ensure that invalid or missing inputs block submission.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that hours are mandatory.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Validate that hours must be numeric and greater than zero.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a non-numeric value for hours.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that hours must be a numeric value greater than zero.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Confirm that the system allows submitting completed entries.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
expected_result: The entry should be marked as completed and displayed as such.
The entry should be saved successfully.

test_cases.title: Verify that the system does not allow logging without allocation.
preconditions: User is NOT allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the user must be allocated to the project.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Validate that the list of Work log category is static and taken from portfolio manager.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
expected_result: The work log category should be selected from the static list provided by the portfolio manager.
The entry should be created successfully.

test_cases.title: Confirm that project is searchable from both Brac and BracIT jira and shown list must be assigned to the user.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Search for a project using Brac or BracIT Jira.
5. Verify that the project appears in the list.
6. Verify that the project is assigned to the user.
expected_result: The project should be displayed in the list.
The project should be correctly assigned to the user.

test_cases.title: Verify that the system allows selecting a date beyond the current month.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a date beyond the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the date must be within the current month.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Ensure that the hours field is numeric and greater than zero.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that hours must be greater than zero.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Validate that the Work Description field is available.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
expected_result: The entry should be created successfully.
The work description should be saved with the entry.

test_cases.title: Confirm that the system allows submitting completed entries with zero hours.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
expected_result: The entry should be marked as completed successfully.
The entry should be saved as a completed entry with zero hours.

test_cases.title: Verify that the system handles invalid date formats correctly.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the date format is invalid.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Confirm that the system correctly handles large numeric values for hours.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a large numeric value (e.g., 999999) for hours.
expected_result: The entry should be created successfully.
The entry should be saved with the large numeric value for hours.

test_cases.title: Validate that the system correctly handles empty work descriptions.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
7. Leave the work description field blank.
expected_result: The entry should be created successfully.
The entry should be saved with an empty work description.

test_cases.title: Verify that the system correctly handles special characters in the work description.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date within the current month.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from Brac or BracIT Jira.
6. Enter a numeric value greater than zero for hours.
7. Enter a work description containing special characters (e.g., 'This is a test!@#$%^&*()').
expected_result: The entry should be created successfully.
The entry should be saved with the work description containing special characters.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Invalid Date Format (MM/DD/YYYY)
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Enter a date in MM/DD/YYYY format (e.g., 13/01/2024).
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the date format is invalid.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Boundary Test - Hours = 0
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date from the calendar.
4. Select a valid Work Log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The entry should be saved with 0 hours.
The entry should be displayed with 0 hours.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Date in the Future
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a date in the future.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the date must be within the current month.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Positive Test - Valid Data Entry
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date from the calendar.
4. Select a valid Work Log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
6. Enter a valid value in the hours field.
expected_result: The entry should be saved successfully.
The entry should be displayed with the entered data.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Missing Required Fields
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date from the calendar.
4. Select a valid Work Log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
7. Leave the work description field blank.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the hours and work description fields are required.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Positive Test - Saving a Completed Entry
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date from the calendar.
4. Select a valid Work Log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The entry should be marked as completed.
The entry should be displayed with a completed status.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Invalid Date Format (DD/MM/YYYY)
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Enter a date in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., 26/10/2023).
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the date format is invalid.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Hours Greater Than 24
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date from the calendar.
4. Select a valid Work Log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the hours cannot exceed 24.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Positive Test - Saving a New Entry
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid date from the calendar.
4. Select a valid Work Log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
6. Enter a valid value in the hours field.
expected_result: The entry should be saved successfully.
The entry should be displayed with the entered data.

test_cases.title: Verify that the system allows users to create daily time log entries with valid inputs.
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
4. Select a valid work log category from the portfolio manager.
5. Select a project from the searchable list (Brac or BracIT Jira).
6. Enter a valid number of hours (e.g., 8).
expected_result: The entry should be saved successfully.
The entry should be displayed in the timesheet.
The system should confirm successful submission.

test_cases.title: Role-Based Access - Manager Cannot Edit
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
4. Select a valid work log category.
6. Enter a valid number of hours.
expected_result: The system should prevent the Manager from saving the entry.
An error message should be displayed indicating insufficient permissions.

test_cases.title: Boundary Test - Hours = 24
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
4. Select a valid work log category.
expected_result: The system should accept 24 hours.
The entry should be saved successfully.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Date in the Past
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a date in the past (e.g., 2024-01-26).
4. Select a valid work log category.
6. Enter a valid number of hours.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the date must be today or in the future.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Positive Test - Saving with Special Characters
preconditions: User is allocated to the project
steps: 2. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
4. Select a valid work log category.
7. Enter a description with special characters like !@#$%^&*()_+=-`~[]\{}|;':",.<>?
expected_result: The entry should be saved successfully with the special characters.
The entry should be displayed in the timesheet.

test_cases.title: Ensure that invalid Date Format (MM/DD/YYYY) is blocked.
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid work log category.
4. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating the invalid date format.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Date Format - Invalid Characters
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
2. Enter a date with invalid characters (e.g., 1/1/2024)
3. Select a valid work log category.
4. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating the invalid date format.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Positive Test - Saving with Valid Data
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid work log category.
4. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The entry should be saved successfully.
The entry details should be displayed correctly.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Hours Value Exceeds Limit
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid work log category.
4. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating the hours value exceeds the limit.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Date Field is Empty
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid work log category.
4. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the date field is required.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Work Description Field is Empty
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
2. Leave the work description field empty.
3. Select a valid work log category.
4. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the work description field is required.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Hours Value is Empty
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select a valid work log category.
4. Select a valid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the hours value field is required.
The entry should not be saved.

test_cases.title: Negative Test - Invalid Project Selection
steps: 1. Navigate to the Timesheet Entry Page.
3. Select an invalid project from the searchable list.
expected_result: The system should display an error message indicating that the project selection is invalid.
The entry should not be saved.
